---
name: writing-agent-instructions
description: Create or revise an agent instruction file that is clear, scoped, and consistent with the project flow.
---

# Writing Agent Instructions

Define the trigger, role, ownership, inputs, boundaries, required checks, handoffs, and return format. Keep the agent user-invocable setting intentional. Avoid product or stack assumptions in reusable roles. Ensure the instruction does not conflict with `.github/AGENTS_FLOW.md` or `docs/project/AGENT_GUIDANCE.md`.
